infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: PULSE needs motion sensors to measure road roughness (IRI) via accelerometer at 200Hz.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PULSE needs GPS to geotag road segments and compute vehicle speed for IRI calculation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: PULSE needs background GPS to continue recording during long drives.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PULSE uses the rear camera to visually assess road surface conditions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PULSE uses the microphone to classify road surface type from tire-road contact noise.

plugins.cameraPermission: PULSE uses the rear camera to visually assess road surface conditions.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PULSE needs GPS to geotag road segments.
